idea: Build an AI-powered resume optimization and job matching platform for job seekers
description: A SaaS platform that uses AI to optimize resumes for Applicant Tracking Systems (ATS), matches qualified candidates with relevant jobs in real-time, and provides personalized career coaching. The platform analyzes job descriptions, identifies skills gaps, recommends certifications, and matches candidates to positions with 85%+ accuracy. Targets the $24B+ recruitment technology market with multiple revenue streams: B2C subscriptions ($9.99-29.99/mo), B2B enterprise licensing with HR platforms, and partnerships with coding bootcamps and universities. Experienced team with 15+ years in HR tech. Already in beta with 5000+ users showing 60% conversion rate to paid plans.
